description: Converted 57 posts and 23 pages from classic editor HTML to valid Gutenberg blocks using canonical gutenberg_utils.py module. Zero failures.
Added cross-links and last-updated dates to pages 4402 (How We Research), 4403 (Editorial Process), 300 (Privacy Policy), 4405 (Corrections Policy).
Created 4 new informational posts (4783-4786) covering bed sizing, materials, washing, and placement.
Created 4 new informational posts (4787-4790) covering toy safety, mental stimulation, play styles, and DIY toys.
Created 2 new posts (4791-4792): training treats selection guide and puppy socialisation timeline.
Added 25 internal links across 11 existing posts connecting pillar/supporting posts to new expansion content.
All 10 new expansion posts have meta_title, meta_description, focus_keyword, and schema type set via RankMath.
All new posts passed all 12 safety gates: title, slug, excerpt, category, tags, featured image alt, meta title, meta desc, H1, internal links, FAQ block, publish status.
